transcript.text:
(Do you want to hear a special piece of information?)
(Do you remember 'Land-tteok' in Yeongju?)
(That Land-tteok...)
(is here in Seoul now!)
(Trying Yeongju 'Land-tteok' in Seoul)
(Let's try it) Wow, looks delicious!
(Is this Yeongju or Seoul...?) It looks the same with the cabbage on top
(You will fall in love with tteokbokki's main ingredient, garaetteok!)
(I saved saying 'delicious' for today) The tteok is so delicious
(I saved saying 'delicious' for today) Delicious!
(I'm only telling you because it's you guys...)
(Songpa-dong, Songpa-gu, Seoul)
Hello everyone
I came to Songpa today
I really enjoyed eating tteokbokki
from 'Land-tteok' a while ago

(Yeongju 'Land-tteok' - Most famous tteokbokki stall in Yeongju) I think it has over
(Yeongju 'Land-tteok' video reached 6.2M views) 6 million views now
(Kept thinking of 'Land-tteok') It was really delicious so I craved it from time to time
When I was searching blogs,
(Yeongju 'Land-tteok' in Seoul...?) I saw that they opened one in Songpa, Seoul so I hurried over here
Ta-da! This is 'Land-tteok'
('Land-tteok' located in Songpa, Seoul)
The reviews said it tastes the same as 'Land-tteok'
and it's very delicious
(Let's go) Anyway, I'll go and try it out
Hello!
Wow..
(They still use the huge steel grill) Tteokbokki in the big grill
(A lot of tteokbokki in the huge steel grill) They had it in that big grill last time too
Wow, did they have this many dishes on the menu
(Looks like a lot when written down) when I ate at the food stall?

It hasn't been long since it opened
So
it's a bit small inside and there are a lot of customers
I'll eat quickly today
I'll order at the kiosk over there!
(Today's order) 5 tteok, 4 of them, 5 eomuk
(5 mul-eomuk)
Sundae, 4 eggs
Twigim...
2 assorted twigim
2 Coolpis
(Yeongju 'Land-tteok' in Songpa)
(While the food is getting prepared...)
(a mini fan signing is happening) I've been a long-time subscriber
(a mini fan signing is happening) Oh really?
(Cute) 1, 2, 3

I'm kind of a YouTuber as well
Oh, you're a YouTuber?
I haven't uploaded a lot
- He has 8 subscribers lol - 8 subscribers...
(Hahaha)
It's called ???
Yongttok?!
(Brave and smart Yongttok) (Like, comment, subscribe, turn on notifications for Yongttok!)
Ah, Yongttok
(Food is ready)
- Oh there's another one - Yes
(Done setting up) Wow, looks delicious!
(Done setting up) It's been such a long time
but the sauce color and the cabbage look the same as before
I'll give it a try
It's been a while, amazing

(Like, comment, subscribe, turn on notifications 'Brave and smart Yongttok')
(Done promoting)
Whoa, it's spicy
It's super spicy
Whoa, this is
- probably too spicy for kids - (I ate it)
The tteok is really delicious
The tteok is so chewy
and soft
The rice tteok's unique...
The tteok stretches out a lot
(Similar spiciness...?) I think it tastes 90% the same
Did I become good at eating spicy food?
(Recent video proof of her eating spicy food) I'm good at eating spicy food these days
I'm gonna use chopsticks
(Reminiscing about Yeongju) It's been so long

(Reminiscing about Yeongju) I really missed this
but I can't go to Yeongju just to eat this, it's really far
I was really excited after finding out they opened one here
I still remember that 'Land-tteok' is called 'Land-tteok'
(The street vendor got permission from the city to do business here) because it's in front of Landrover
The tteok is so delicious
Eomuk!
Looks delicious
(Tzuyang's spoon) Is this a spoon?
Wow, it's delicious
I'll try something else too
It's delicious!
It's chewy on the inside
(Sniffle)
Huh?
(The squid twigim seems different) I don't think the squid twigim was like this last time

(Twigim with glutinous rice are popular these days) There's a lot of glutinous rice squid twigim these days. Is this that too?
Delicious
Wow, this squid twigim is a must!
I wasn't gonna eat the veggies twigim but I just ordered the assorted twigim
Delicious
You can choose the tteok and eomuk here
(You can choose at the kiosk) You can order something like 2 eomuks and 3 tteoks
This is eomuk
(1 eomuk X, 5 eomuks O) This is 1 eomuk
I'm gonna eat another tteok
The tteok is so delicious
There's this round eomuk too
(Don't need to say it) Eomuk and twigim with tteokbokki is a must!
(A must!) Eggs are the best too
If there aren't any eggs with this kind of tteokbokki...
it's no good

It's delicious
Oh how much
tteokbokki did I eat in Yeongju?
I gave up because it was too spicy
I guess I really got better with spicy food
(It must be really good since I keep repeating myself) Their tteok is so delicious!
Gimmari!
(Touched) So delicious
It's really soft, not hard at all
like freshly-made tteok
If you like spicy food
and garaetteok tteokbokki, you'd like this
(The garaetteok looks delicious even though I'm already eating it) Ah, looks delicious
(Spicy warning) It's spicy now
(It's still spicy...) It's getting spicier...
Then, you gotta cool down with the egg

(Cut) I'll cut it in half
I'm just gonna eat it like this
If there's tteokbokki I like,
I buy it and freeze it
I take it out little by little and eat it
(When was it? Was it when I was passing by?) When was it? I bought it when was there
and I put it in the freezer
(Anyway, it was delicious and I finished it all) I ate it all
When
I went to Yeongju that time, I heard that
when it's Lunar New Year or the holidays,
so many people
line up and eat 'Land-tteok'
(Now, you can enjoy it in Seoul..!) You don't have to stand in line during the Lunar New Year holidays
How many did I eat last time?
(60 tteok, eomuk which is more than now) It's 60 with both tteok and eomuk

Oh? Then, I ate more back then
Usually, you eat less as you age!
(Age attack)
That's why you can only eat that amount?
(Tzuyang doesn't know how to lose...)
(Soup refill) Thank you
Whoa, it's hot..!
It's called 'Land-tteok'
because it's in front of Landrover
There's also 'Nonghyup Chicken Skewers' next to Land-tteok
(People say they opened a restaurant now) They called it 'Nonghyup Chicken Skewers'
(People say they opened a restaurant now) because it was in front of Nonghyup
(Trying 'Nonghyup Chicken Skewers' when I go to 'Land-tteok') I should try it next time
(Trying 'Nonghyup Chicken Skewers' when I go to 'Land-tteok') I heard it was very delicious
There aren't a lot left
I don't really

(Telling the truth) eat the veggie twigim
(Still picky) I want squid twigim, not veggie twigim
Tteok!
'Land-tteok' is all about tteok!
(Removing the cabbage blanket...)
(You did good, you picky eater ..) I don't think I can eat any more cabbage
I'm gonna stop eating cabbage!
I recommend eating 'Land-tteok' right away
rather than taking it to-go
(Chewy garaetteok) The texture is different
when it's cold and when you eat it right away
Both are good
(Everything tastes better when eaten right away) but it's softer when it's warm
(Coolpis, Juicy Cool after Coke) Why am I drinking so much Coolpis?
There are 5 left
(Wants to be at an age where flowers continue to bloom...) I want to make it into this shape

Whoa, I have to eat the eomuk
I forgot about the eomuk
Mm, the eomuk is delicious too
Oh, it really tastes the same
(It's spicy now that I finished eating...)
Gotta have eomuk when it's spicy
(We have these empty plates today as well)
I'm a bit bummed
that there aren't any intestines
(A bit bummed there weren't intestines) I like intestines more than sundae
At the other 'Land-tteok',
(I can't forget it) there's that specific vibe of eating at the food stall
Last tteok!
Egg!
Dipped in the sauce
(Finished it all) That was good

I wanted to eat 'Land-tteok' from time to time
(Yeongju's tteokbokki representative) It was nice that I could eat it in Seoul
Anyway, I had a good meal today
